reservations.reservation: Treat this as constitutional intent; enforcement must remain strict and audited in council-run outputs.
mitigation: Log vote_mode + blocker packets + reservations into motion artifacts every run.
reservations.what_to_watch: Any ratification missing required role votes or allowing NO without blocker_packet.

votes.rationale: Approve the pivot; the runner now has vote-mode support and should enforce it consistently.
Unanimous consent + blocker packets prevents majority railroading and preserves objections durably.
Deadlock protocol ensures productive friction without paralysis; objections remain part of trace.
